stonetop.summary: A challenge-serpent hung from the Nerth Tree, testing all who would eat its heart.

system.concept: A challenge-serpent hung from the Nerth Tree, testing all who would eat its heart.
system.description: The Nerth Tree grows in the Great Wood. It can only be found by one mortal each midsummer, by following a particular path in the woods, and its roots are littered with the bones of former supplicants. Hanging from the tree is a great serpent. Crush it and eat its heart, and you will gain its vitality. But good luck with that.
